actions.text: # B01: Detailed Recap
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: ## Key Decisions and Agreements
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: **Panel Preparation Sync**: Lisa and Vrijen aligned on tomorrow's panel approach - focus on "getting into flow state, letting nerves settle, and just yapping" with strategic hot takes delivered thoughtfully given diverse stakeholder audience
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: **Careerspan Partnership Exploration**: Lisa expressed strong interest in Careerspan's job distribution system for Colby students and alumni - particularly the ability to bypass handshake and provide filtered, matched opportunities
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: **Alumni Network Opportunity Identified**: Lisa highlighted that alumni job distribution may be even more valuable than undergrad placement - classes 2017-2022 are all pivoting, creating immediate demand for career transition support
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: **Marvin Ventures Integration Shared**: Vrijen shared that McKinsey's unofficial alumni fund will start posting jobs through Careerspan - significant validation point that resonated with Lisa
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: ## Strategic Context
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Career Services Pain Points:**
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Lisa manages a challenging trifecta at Colby: (1) inbound job requests from employers she must qualify and vet manually, (2) handshake platform that both students and colleges hate, and (3) growing alumni population (2017-2022 cohorts) actively seeking career transitions in difficult market. The manual vetting workload is significant - she emphasized taking time to "vet them, have proper conversation, fall in love with them" for startups and non-traditional employers.
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Market Timing:**
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: The conversation revealed acute hiring market dysfunction from both sides. Founders aren't even looking at inbound applications anymore - they post for legal reasons but exclusively hire through warm referrals with dramatically raised bars. Meanwhile, top MBA graduates from Columbia are still unemployed months after graduation (first time Lisa has seen this), and Bain summer analysts aren't getting return offers. AI is being used as cover for layoffs more than genuine transformation.
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Partnership Value Proposition:**
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Careerspan could solve three problems simultaneously: (1) automated employer vetting and job matching, (2) handshake replacement with better student experience, (3) alumni career transition support. Lisa was particularly interested in the ability to distribute jobs to matched students automatically and the filtering capability that lets employers describe ideal co-workers via voice message.
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Positioning Insight:**
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Lisa's experience spans Bennington (creative, no resources, clothing-optional culture) and Bowdoin before Colby. She values practical solutions over bureaucracy, appreciates founder energy, and has deep networks (advisor to multiple startups including recruiting founders from Colby). The McKinsey casing guide Vrijen created (5-6k views, comprehensive) immediately impressed her - she recognizes quality execution.
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: ## Critical Next Action
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Owner:** Vrijen
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Deliverable:** Send Lisa a Colby-specific signup code and implementation proposal showing how Careerspan would integrate with Davis Connects (Colby's career services system)
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Timeline:** Within 1 week of this meeting
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Purpose:** Enable Lisa to evaluate pilot feasibility with concrete implementation details, demonstrating value to both students and alumni while addressing her handshake pain points
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window
